CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_GISProximityCheck when the project footprint intersects a BLM Public Land Survey System (PLSS) parcel (0.25-mile buffer). Confirms BLM surface management authority and federal nexus. Informs agency routing and required permit matrix for FLPMA right-of-way grants.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Project footprint intersects BLM public land (PLSS). BLM surface management authority confirmed. Right-of-way grant and bonding requirements apply under FLPMA.
CustomField.label: PLSS Public Land Flag
